markdown:
#  Navigate a Model's Drawing from the 2D View 
##  Background 
Navigating complex 3D models can be difficult. Use the 2D drawing view as a powerful map to find your way. Just open a 2D plan, place a marker, and instantly jump to that exact spot in the 3D model. This saves you time and makes finding a specific location fast and easy.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/models-project/permissions)


##  Prerequisites 
  * At least one model must be published to the project. See [Publish a Model to Procore](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/models-project/tutorials/publish-navisworks-models-to-procore-using-the-procore-bim-plugin).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Models** tool.
  2. Select the **model**.
  3. Click the model's drawing thumbnail to open the 2D drawing. 
#####  Note
To access the model's drawing, you must select **Default** ![Icon Default Estimating](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f2c1ad8acc42c001612a7ef085d91429/d63107131054f7fa93813b85ffdb1b1f/icon-default-estimating.png?fm=webp) option on the toolbar.
![View 2d Model Web](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/546e2114c4345b40a943cb88a64ad273/8d31a46de5177b13d2e0d2d5a973de1b/view-2d-model-web.jpg?fm=webp)
  4. You have these options in the 2D model view:
  5. Click in the direction that you want to view in the 3D model.
     * Scroll to zoom in and out.
     * Click and drag to pan.
  6. Click to **place a marker**. The marker rotates with the cursor.
  7. Double-click the **drawing** to navigate to the location of the position marker on the 3D model.


## See Also
  * [Getting Started Guide: 2D Views in the Models Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/models-project/tutorials/getting-started-guide-2d-views-in-the-models-tool)
  * [View a Model](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/models-project/tutorials/view-a-model)
  * [Publish Navisworks® Models to Procore Using the Procore BIM Plugin](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/models-project/tutorials/publish-navisworks-models-to-procore-using-the-procore-bim-plugin)
